item.name: Wind-up Minfilia
item.description:
Unlike the real Minfilia, this one actually accompanies you on your adventures.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Minfilia minion.
item.tooltip:
...Hello? Hello? Can you
hear me? It is I, Minfilia.
  - Minfilia
item.specialactiondescription: Delivers an attack with a potency of 230 to all enemies within range.
